selected_slice: Add the missing Site Admin Programs setup path with a real scoped route and workspace section.
selection_reason: The repo already had site_programs schema support, selected-site scoping helpers, and a durable scorecard explicitly naming Programs as the top Site Admin gap, while the route and UI path were still missing.
repo_grounded_findings: Site Admin and Global Admin already had site-scoped dashboard, operations, review, and access-management surfaces, but no dedicated /api/site/programs route or Programs workspace section.
The existing schema already supported safe activation and deactivation through site_programs.active without destructive deletes.
The role-readiness scorecard still named the lack of a real Programs GUI path as the top Site Admin readiness gap.
changes: Added /api/site/programs GET and POST handling with auth, site scoping, add/remove behavior, and audit writes.
Added canManageSitePrograms() and a Programs workspace section for Site Admin and Global Admin only.
Rendered active-program, available-program, add, remove, and empty-state UI with no fake links or dead controls.
Added focused route, workspace, permission, and navigation regression coverage.
Regenerated production route inventory and refreshed role-readiness/audit/run-log closeout docs.
next_recommended: Prove seeded Site Admin Programs behavior end-to-end with demo accounts, then run the first full Administration and Viewer click-through scorecard refresh.
